strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise
Experience with AI-agent infrastructure and agentic workflows
Proven track record of scaling engineering teams and developing technical leadership
concerns: Lack of direct experience in fintech infrastructure
No clear experience with large-scale multi-agent AI systems in production

key_factors.factor: Technical depth in AI and distributed systems

response.justification: The candidate has relevant technical expertise in AI and distributed systems, and experience scaling engineering teams, but lacks direct experience in fintech infrastructure and executive leadership roles.
